calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73500245 --event evt-petition-disposition --role predictor","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg --files data/cases/scotus/73500245 | sort && UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73500245 --event evt-petition-disposition --role predictor","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const xs = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|search|citation|docket/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(xs);

const a = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",court:"scotus",q:"\"fair warning\" due process judicial interpretation",order_by:"score desc",num_results:8,fields:["caseName","citation","dateFiled","absolute_url","snippet","court_citation_string"]});
text(JSON.stringify(a));

text(JSON.stringify(a));
